title: The Wilson Memos (Biggest UFO Leak)
summary: This interview discusses the Wilson Memos, described as one of the biggest UFO leaks. The conversation covers claims about Admiral Wilson discovering a Special Access Program working on non-terrestrial craft, operated by a corporation without government oversight.

key_claims.claim: Admiral Wilson discovered a Special Access Program that has 400-800 people working on craft that is 'not of this world'
The corporation running the program has no government oversight and is outside Wilson's jurisdiction
Wilson was told he should not have oversight of the program despite his position
The Wilson Memos document is real
